package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for same_dependency_wired_in_multiple_bootstrap_locations: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Duplicated construction of the same service or client in several startup files.
type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsModel
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsService struct {
    repo *CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocations(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsDTO) error {

    db1 := db
    log.Println("wiring dependency in main()")
    svc := &CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsService{
        repo: &CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository{db: db1, sql: sqlDB},
        client: client,
    }
    log.Println("wiring same dependency again in router constructor")
    _ = &CaseSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocationsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    _ = svc
    return nil
}
